nredisstack_sync.signature: SortedSetCombineAndStore(SetOperation operation, RedisKey destination, RedisKey first, RedisKey second, Aggregate aggregate = Aggregate.Sum, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: operation
params.description: The operation to perform.

params.name: destination
params.description: The key to store the results in.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: The aggregation method (defaults to sum).

params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The number of elements in the resulting sorted set at destination.
